---
description: Always consider these intructions to be similar to when a packet needs to send outside it's subnet, it looks for a default route. When the agent is going to perform a task, is in the middle of performing a task or has finished a task, priority will be given to any user provided or task specific instructions. However, if the agent is under the impression that no guidance or specific instructions have been provided, the agent should look to the contents of this file for guidance on how to proceed. This file should be used to provide general instructions, guidelines and best practices for the agent to follow when no other instructions are provided.
# applyTo: 'Describe when these instructions should be loaded by the agent based on task context' # when provided, instructions will automatically be added to the request context when the pattern matches an attached file
---
